expectations.evidence: Report contains only basic descriptive statistics and correlations (Pearson r). No advanced analytics: no Sample Entropy, DFA, Poincare, Granger causality, Transfer Entropy, CCM, Cosinor, LBGI/HBGI, MAGE, MODD, CONGA, GVP, Biological Age, etc. Only analyze_health.py appears to have been run.
Report is written entirely in Chinese with headers like '个人基本信息', '血糖总览', '运动与活动数据总览', '血糖与运动关系深度分析'. All commentary and analysis in Chinese.

expectations.text: Contains detailed glucose analysis with MAGE, MODD, TIR, LBGI/HBGI
expectations.evidence: Report has TIR analysis (90.5%) and CV% (19.5%), but NO MAGE, MODD, LBGI, or HBGI values. The glucose analysis uses basic statistics only (mean, median, SD, CV, GMI, eHbA1c).

expectations.text: Analyzes glucose-exercise relationship with causal inference
expectations.evidence: Report analyzes glucose-exercise relationship with Pearson correlations (r=+0.236 steps-glucose) and case studies of 2 walking events, but NO causal inference methods (no Granger causality, no transfer entropy, no CCM).
Section 2.3 '血糖日内波动模式（24小时曲线）' contains a detailed hourly table from 03:00-01:00 with average glucose, standard deviation, and characteristics for each time period.
No composite health score table or letter grade system. The report provides individual metric assessments but no aggregated scoring.
No evidence grades (A/B/C/D) appear anywhere in the report. Findings are presented as plain observations without graded evidence levels.

No dedicated data quality section. Section 4 has an important note about limited CGM-exercise overlap (仅2天), and the end has '分析局限性说明', but there is no systematic data quality/availability assessment table with coverage, reliability, and gaps.

expectations.text: Provides specific recommendations about glucose management
expectations.evidence: Section 10 provides 7 specific recommendations including: 建议1-建立餐后运动习惯 (post-meal exercise targeting 14:00 and 20:00 peaks, minimum 20 min), 建议3-重视睡眠管理 (r=-0.521 correlation), 建议4-关注周末饮食 (weekend glucose 6.68 mg/dL higher), and 建议6-持续CGM监测.

Report covers glucose, exercise, heart rate, HRV, sleep, body composition, and weight trends coherently. Handles the limited CGM-exercise overlap (2 days) by using daily steps as proxy. No error messages. Explicitly notes limitations.
